description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a mix of horizontal wood and white panel siding, accented by dark stone trim. The structure includes a prominent flat-roofed section with a large rooftop terrace, surrounded by black railings, and a secondary sloped roof that adds visual interest. Large windows and asymmetrical window placements provide ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front entryway is sheltered by a flat overhang supported by stone columns, leading to a recessed doorway. The house sits on a concrete base, and the exterior spaces include multiple patios and balconies, enhancing outdoor living. The overall look is sleek, geometric, and urban, suitable for a high-end residential neighborhood.
description: A modern house with wood and white panel siding, flat and sloped roofs, large windows, and multiple terraces. Features include stone accents, black railings, and a prominent rooftop patio.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the sloped roof, wood siding, and a side patio area with black railings.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main entryway with a flat overhang, large windows, and a mix of wood and white panel siding.
description_view_2: The side view displays the rooftop terrace, white panel siding, and a secondary patio area.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals the sloped roof, wood siding, and a large open patio with black railings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door under a flat overhang, supported by stone columns, with a small porch area
